results.Query: Add new_EK_PORT_40 to ju1.a1.m2. List direct child nodes of ju1.a1.m2 in the updated graph. Return a list of child nodes name.
results.Label: capacity planning, level-3, add-list
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = graph_data.copy()
    new_node_name = 'new_EK_PORT_40'
    graph_copy.add_node(new_node_name, name=new_node_name, type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=40000000000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a1.m2', new_node_name, type='RK_CONTAINS')
    direct_children = [target for source, target, edge_data in graph_copy.out_edges('ju1.a1.m2', data=True) if edge_data['type'] == 'RK_CONTAINS']
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return {'type': 'list', 'data': direct_children, 'updated_graph': graph_json}
